accessibility.body: This portal is designed for WCAG 2.1 AA. Report barriers through the citizen assistant, telephone channel, or your national agency support desk. The site is verified with Windows Narrator (Windows + Ctrl + Enter) and other major screen readers.
accessibility.title: Accessibility statement
apply.childBenefit.lede: Apply for child or family benefits. Upload supporting documents — we extract the data and pre-check eligibility before a caseworker decides.
apply.childBenefit.title: Child & family benefit
apply.residency.lede: A single guided application that updates your civil registration with the relevant Nordic authority.
apply.residency.title: Residency transfer
apply.taxCert.lede: Request an official certificate of your tax residency, signed by the competent authority.
apply.taxCert.title: Tax residency certificate
banner.aiDisclosure: You may be assisted by AI. A human can help you.
banner.plainLanguage: We use short, clear words on this page.
cases.cancelConfirm: Cancel this application? You can re-apply later.
cases.deleteConfirm: Remove this case from local cache only? It stays in the back-end record.
cases.empty: You don’t have any cases yet. Start an application from the homepage.
cases.notSignedIn: Sign in to see your cases.
cases.title: My cases
compliance.hero.lede1: UDCSP runs on the same European cloud, governance and data-protection rules as any modern public agency. The frameworks below are the ones a regulator would expect to see.
compliance.section.evidence: Evidence pack available to a regulator
compliance.section.rights: Citizen rights and operational service levels
compliance.title: Compliance & regulatory posture
consent.erasure.button: Request permanent erasure of my data
consent.erasure.title: Right to erasure (GDPR Article 17)
consent.lede: You stay in charge of your data. Toggle each item to allow or revoke a permission. Revocations propagate within seconds.
consent.title: Consent & privacy
demos.architecture.heading: How everything is wired
demos.lede: Ten end-to-end scenarios — citizen journeys, back-office work, governance, observability and DevOps. Pick one and follow the deep links.
demos.scenarios.heading: The ten scenarios
demos.scenarios.lede: Each demo is self-contained and can be played independently.
demos.title: Demonstration scenarios
error.network: We could not reach the service.
footer.label: Footer
home.bridge.body: UDCSP is a unified citizen platform that connects, in a single guided experience, the registers, eIDs and case systems of Denmark, Sweden and Norway. We don’t replace national authorities — we collect your data once, validate the cross-border rules (Info Norden, Øresunddirekt, Grensetjänsten, EU Single Digital Gateway), pre-fill the right form, and submit it to the competent authority for your country.
home.bridge.heading: A unified platform across the Nordic public sector
home.hero.lede: One trusted entry point for residents of Denmark, Sweden and Norway. Apply once, follow your case in real time, get help in your language — with caseworkers always in the loop.
home.hero.title: Unified Digital Citizen Services
home.principle.aiHelps.body: AI can pre-read your documents, suggest the right form and give a first opinion on whether you’re eligible — but a real caseworker reviews every decision and signs it off. You always see, in plain language, what the AI suggested and why.
home.principle.aiHelps.title: AI helps, a person decides
home.principle.dataAtHome.body: When you sign in as a Danish, Swedish or Norwegian resident, the portal talks only to that country’s public-service systems. Nothing about you is copied or stored in another country.
home.principle.dataAtHome.title: Your data stays in your country
home.principle.everyone.body: The portal is available in twelve languages, including Polish, Arabic, Sámi, Ukrainian and Finnish. You can use it entirely with a keyboard, with a screen reader, in high-contrast mode or with a dyslexia-friendly font.
home.principle.everyone.title: Made for everyone
home.principle.youDecide.body: You decide what we may do with your data — share with another Nordic country, send you SMS reminders, forward a copy to a third party. You can change your mind at any time on the Consent page, and the change takes effect immediately.
home.principle.youDecide.title: You stay in charge
home.principles.heading: How the platform works for you
home.principles.lede: Four simple promises behind every screen — your data stays at home, AI helps but never decides alone, the portal is usable by everyone, and you stay in charge of your information.
home.service.cases.desc: Track every application across countries. Real-time status, secure messaging, audit trail — across DK / SE / NO authorities.
home.service.cases.title: My cases
home.service.childBenefit.desc: Check eligibility and apply for child or family benefits. Upload payslip, lease or birth certificate — we extract the data and route to the competent authority.
home.service.childBenefit.title: Child & family benefit
home.service.residency.desc: One guided intake. We pre-fill the country-specific registration steps and route you to the right authority — borger.dk / CPR · Skatteverket · Skatteetaten.
home.service.residency.title: Residency transfer
home.service.taxCert.desc: Request a tax residency certificate for DK, SE or NO. We pick the right form and pre-fill it from your eID data.
home.service.taxCert.title: Tax residency certificate
home.services.heading: What can we help you with today?
home.services.lede: Pick a service and we’ll guide you. Every form pre-fills what we already know.
home.trust.list.label: Platform guarantees
language.switcher.label: Choose language
login.action.help: You will be redirected to your national identity tenant. New residents register; returning users sign in.
login.lede: Choose the country whose services you need. Your account is created on the matching national identity tenant — your data stays in that country.
login.method.help: In production, residents authenticate either with email and password (returning users) or with their national eID. The eID button is shown for clarity but disabled in this prototype — the real wiring goes through a certified OIDC broker federated to External ID.
login.title: Sign in to UDCSP
logout.body: Your browser session has ended. Shared devices should also be closed after use.
logout.title: You are signed out
status.inReview: A caseworker is reviewing your request.
status.needInfo: We need more information from you.
